---
title: "CI Smoke"
subtitle: "Smoke render — confirma stack DuckDB + Pandas + Plotly + Quarto"
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    output-file: ci-smoke.html
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
import duckdb
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

con = duckdb.connect()
df = pd.DataFrame({"x": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], "y": [10, 12, 9, 14, 11]})
con.register("smoke", df)
n = con.sql("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM smoke").fetchone()[0]
print(f"smoke rows: {n}")
```

```{python}
#| label: plot
#| echo: false
fig = px.line(df, x="x", y="y", title="Smoke plot")
fig.show()
```

CI smoke OK.
